narrative:
Washington Township has 1,052 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.0 percentage points.
